name: Gingerbread Dough for Structures
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening and sugar together until smooth.
2. Add the molasses and egg; beat thoroughly to combine.
3. Sift together the remaining dry ingredients (flour, baking soda, baking powder, cinnamon, ginger, cloves, nutmeg).
4. Gradually add the sifted dry ingredients to the liquid mixture, mixing well after each addition.
5. If the dough is too stiff to work with, add water a little at a time until it comes together.
6. Roll the dough to 1/2 inch thickness and cut out shapes using cookie cutters.
7. Bake at 350°F for 15-18 minutes or until firm.
8. Carefully remove from baking sheets to cooling racks; allow to cool completely before assembly with Royal icing.
(Note: For best results, roll out the dough directly on the prepared baking sheet, cut shapes, and avoid transferring them. The dough spreads slightly during baking and may crack if moved with a thin spatula.)
